title: If the Angels were real what would be your reaction
display_title: If the Angels were real what would be your reaction
wikitext:
[]: If the Angels were real, what would be your reaction?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:52 pm If the Angel's were real, what would be your reaction? Imagine this scenario: You're minding your own business, when you turn on the TV to a news broadcast. You recognize Angels 3-17 rampaging throughout the world in random spots. Sachiel: Marching through Japan Shamshel: Whipping England to death Ramiel: Blasting apart everything in France Gaghiel: Sinking all naval craft; commonly seen near the Oceanic Islands and Pacific Ocean Israfel (Merging and Separating at will): Dancing through Bejing Sandolphon: Hopping out of volcanoes in Hawaii and parts of random islands all over the globe Matariel: Melting everything in Germany Sahaquiel: Dropping things on South America Iruel: Infecting things in South Africa and spreading rapidly Leliel: Appears in Canada, swallows a city, then moves on to another town to repeat the process Bardiel (In Eva-03): Rampaging through Massachusetts and headed west Zeruel:Smashing up most of the Middle East, then moves south. Arael: Mind raping all manned space craft Armisael: Infecting and consuming everything in the Northern part of Africa Tabris: (In Eva-02) Starts in Russia, then heads west, then south. Your reaction to this news broadcast? And no, the broadcasters wouldn't know the names of the Angels, or even that they are the Angels, that's just for convenience.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:04 pm I'd cry and would probably die if one of them gets to New York.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:18 pm Well, Bardiel was seen in that part of the US, and could very well head that way. I'd change zip codes, if I was you.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:34 pm Something along the lines of "WHAT THE FUCK SHHHHHHHHIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA"

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:43 pm "Well thats something you don't see everyday..."

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Aug 09, 2009 9:44 pm None of them are near me. So I'd be like "OH NOES!" then I'll realize since I'm not directly affected by the horrible horribleness, I'd stop caring.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:12 pm Australia will be fine. We always are.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:26 pm possibly. If angst ridden teenagers were put in charge of destroying them and those crazy guys in India were right, yea i'd

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sun Aug 09, 2009 10:48 pm Since the Angels aren't coming to San Antonio (poor Alamo otaku...), I wouldn't give a rats ass, until I realize that if the Angels exist, then so does NERV, if that exists, then do the EVA Series, if that, then the pilots, and if so, then Rei is one of them, and I can finally forget about my ex. Though that also means that I'll die at the age of 22, from Instrumentality related complications. So I can finally buy booze legally, and I have one year to get shitfaced enough to last a lifetime? Fuck that. In all honesty, I don't really want to drink, having already done so, I can truthfully say that it tastes bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:26 pm Cypher wrote: "Well thats something you don't see everyday..."

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Aug 09, 2009 11:59 pm "Saw it coming."

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Aug 10, 2009 12:03 am For those of you who say you wouldnt care because you wouldnt be in an area where the angels are, you do realize that with all 17 angels ona rampage it'd only be a matter of time before one of them comes to where you are? First thing I would do is go something like "HOLY CRAP! THE DOOM IS HERE!" then I would go and move some place where there is no people since the chances of the angels screwing around in an unpopulated area is much smaller.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Aug 10, 2009 12:09 am I would go gather some friends and watch them destroy stuff on tv like it was some kind of sports game. I would bring chips, dip, drinks and everything. We would cheer and point at the screen when they destroy landmarks. We would be fine because none of them were headed our way.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 10, 2009 1:13 am My reaction? There will never a better time to splurge on hookers and cocaine. Later I can raise an army and go all The Postman (Mad Max I leave to the Australians, who deserve it) in the relatively untouched "Midwest Coast".

[]:             Quote Post by TheRatherDVD » Mon Aug 10, 2009 2:31 am The Road Warrior could beat that postman guy any day. All he does is gather an army of Child soldiers and let them get shot. Anyways, I'm in Australia so I might summon Zilla from Godzilla Final Wars. Not as good as the real thing, but can beat the crap out of an angel any day.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Mon Aug 10, 2009 5:12 am I would probably turn off the TV, exclaim "All's right with the world!" and wait for my turn to get tanged. Done best in a pose similar to Keel's last shot in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Mon Aug 10, 2009 6:03 am " Well, Shit"

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 10, 2009 7:15 am I would cheer them on.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Aug 10, 2009 7:30 am Title changed so people have an idea what this thread's about.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Aug 10, 2009 7:40 am i would be all like: AWESOME!!!
